alerts.title: Trump threatens US tolls in Strait of Hormuz if Iran deal not reached in 60 days
alerts.summary: PBS reports Trump administration is threatening to impose US toll collection in the Strait of Hormuz unless a final Iran nuclear deal is concluded within 60 days. This represents unprecedented economic coercion tied to diplomacy and escalates pressure amid Iran's Strait closure threat and ongoing Lebanon fighting.

alerts.title: Iran-linked group claims hack of FBI drone fleet; threatens World Cup targeting
alerts.summary: Multiple outlets (France 24, CBS News) report Iran-linked cyber group has claimed successful intrusion into FBI drone systems and issued threats against World Cup infrastructure. Represents significant cyber escalation amid kinetic conflict and may signal Iranian cyber retaliation capability activation.

alerts.title: Al Jazeera cameraman Ahmed Wishah killed in Israeli strike on Gaza
alerts.summary: Al Jazeera confirms journalist Ahmed Wishah killed in Israeli airstrike on Gaza (31.45°N, 34.41°E). Casualty represents targeting of press during active hostilities and heightens civilian harm documentation amid Israel-Lebanon-Gaza simultaneous operations.

alerts.title: US sentiment sharply negative (51%); Trump dominates discourse amid Iran tensions
alerts.summary: Sentiment analysis shows US negative sentiment spiked to 51% (vs 42% positive). 'Trump' leads word cloud (93 mentions) alongside Iran, Meloni, and Strait of Hormuz keywords. Reflects sharp policy debate shift and public concern over Iran escalation and diplomatic stance.

alerts.title: USS Florida submarine redeployed deeper into Persian Gulf amid Iran tensions
alerts.summary: Assets feed confirms USS Florida submarine now positioned in Persian Gulf (25.96°N, 51.75°E), deepening US subsurface presence. Repositioning follows Iran Strait closure threat and escalating proxy activity, signaling readiness for undersea contingency operations.

analysis_note: US-Iran conflict theater remains at critical escalation threshold (threat level 9) with simultaneous kinetic, economic, and cyber pressures: Iran maintains 60% uranium enrichment with 1-2 week breakout window, Strait closure threat backed by missile deployment, cyber attacks on US infrastructure, and Trump administration pursuing aggressive toll-based diplomacy—all while Israel-Hezbollah combat intensifies in Lebanon and Syria despite ceasefire framework.
